---
name: Feature
about: Build out one of the placeholder features
labels: feature
---

**Feature key** (from `/api/features`): <!-- e.g. events -->

**Goal**
<!-- What should a user be able to do? -->

**API** — `api/app/routers/<key>.py`
<!-- endpoints, request/response shape -->

**UI** — `web/src/app/<key>/page.tsx`
<!-- what the page shows -->

**Done when**
- [ ] API returns real data
- [ ] UI replaces the placeholder
- [ ] `features.py` flips `implemented: true`
